heading: Where I've been on the crew.

items.desc: Crewing live broadcasts as in-game observer, league operation and encoder operator, plus remote vMix consulting for international clients through Upwork.
Supporting live tournament productions across replay, technical support, CG/graphics and audio — including Valorant Pacific and international Masters events.
Ran broadcast operations for talkshows, esports events and live e-commerce streams on TikTok, Shopee and Tokopedia.
Vocational diploma — the technical foundation behind my production and signal-flow work.
